query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN hp_bonus = 0 AND attack_bonus = 0 AND defense_bonus = 0 AND speed_bonus = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_bonus FROM game_equipment_catalog;
